name: HPV-negative NILM low-risk state
clinical_description: HPV-negative with NILM cytology and no high-risk screening signal from HPV/TCT/Age variables.

name: hrHPV-positive NILM surveillance state
clinical_description: High-risk HPV positive with NILM cytology, representing surveillance-oriented clinical semantics.

name: ASC-US or LSIL low-grade triage state
clinical_description: ASC-US or LSIL cytology pattern with HPV/TCT/Age variables indicating low-grade triage semantics.

name: HPV16/18-positive or ASC-H/AGC high-risk triage state
clinical_description: HPV16/18 positivity or ASC-H/AGC cytology pattern indicating high-risk triage semantics.

name: HSIL high-grade suspicious state
clinical_description: HSIL cytology pattern indicating high-grade suspicious clinical screening semantics.

name: Discordant high-risk clinical state
clinical_description: Discordant HPV/TCT/Age screening variables where one clinical signal is high-risk while another is unavailable or lower risk.
